name: AR Snake
summary: AR Snake brings a dynamic augmented reality experience to life, fully powered by hand tracking. Use the Materializer machine, featuring a circle to spawn items and an arrow to cycle between them. Procedurally generated snakes move fluidly through your environment, seeking out berries for food, growing larger with each bite, and occasionally encountering rare golden berries for bonus points. Watch as your snake evolves and racks up points, all controlled with intuitive hand gestures.
